title: Greenland
subTitle: A comet's impending impact sends John, Allison and Nathan on a dangerous journey to a secure shelter, battling disasters, uncertainty and human desperation.

title: Hansan
subTitle: Korean admiral Yi Sun-sin and his fleet battle against the attack of the Japanese navy and achieve an epic win through a secret weapon.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Dance With Me
subTitle: Dance fans show their skills and viewers learn cool moves from famous dancers, mixing talent display with fun lessons for all.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Rising Shaolin: The Protector
subTitle: A man is given shelter by a monk from a long-lost Shaolin Temple after he is framed for murder. However, things take an unusual turn when the monk is murdered.

title: Wrong Place
subTitle: Jake, the son of the notorious drug dealer Virgil, goes after former policeman Frank's daughter to stop him from testifying against his father. However, an unexpected surprise awaits him.

title: The Iron Claw
subTitle: The Von Erich siblings battle adversity and their father's imposing legacy as they climb the ranks of the professional wrestling world.

title: Tai Chi Hero
subTitle: Lu Chan is still trying to find his place in his new home, but his presence in Chen Village triggers a curse on the town.

title: Vivarium
subTitle: Things get complicated when Tom and Gemma's search for the perfect house gets them trapped in a maze of identical houses.

title: Savage man
subTitle: After bandits massacre Shankui's tribe, he moves to a forest to live as a savage hermit until he has to take care of a helpless girl and face some ruthless killers sent to finish him.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Tara fears she is losing her mind like her mother did, as unsettling events make her worry she is heading down the same path of mental illness.

title: Huge Shark
subTitle: As the ocean currents change, a deadly cold-blooded killer enters the environment. Disruption ensues when an expert is invited to investigate the situation.

title: Yardie
subTitle: Dennis Campbell is hired by a criminal authority to deliver a package to a gangster in London. However, he finds out that his brother's killer dwells in the same city and decides to seek revenge.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

title: Perfect Nanny
subTitle: Myriam decides to return to work at a law firm and hires a nanny, Louise, to look after her children. However, a treacherous web of mutual dependence soon forms between Louise, Myriam and her family.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Culinary competition heats up as Chefs Ajay and Shipra prepare delicious fish dishes. Furthermore, they present their challenge to Chefs Jeevan and Girish, who accept and cook their own versions.

title: Jeepers Creepers 2
subTitle: A bus carrying a high school basketball team suffers a flat tyre following the kidnapping of Billy Taggar. Trouble ensues when those on board encounter the Creeper, a demonic winged creature.

title: Danger Close
subTitle: Young and amateur Australian and New Zealand soldiers strive hard to survive during the brutal Battle of Long Tan in Vietnam.

title: Jurassic Attack
subTitle: Following their latest covert operation, an elite squad's return flight ends in disaster, leaving them stranded in a remote forest amongst prehistoric predators.

title: Matchless Mulan
subTitle: To protect her father from harm, a courageous girl disguises herself as a male warrior and joins the imperial army to defend her nation.

title: The Beast
subTitle: In an AI ruled future, Gabrielle signs up for a DNA purification that will rid her of unnecessary emotions. However, reliving her past lives as part of the process turns unnerving.

title: Corner Office
subTitle: Orson is an office employee who believes his strict work ethic will help him ascend the corporate ladder. One day, he discovers an elegantly decorated room that his colleagues believe does not exist.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Ip Man
subTitle: A martial artist is forced to leave his home due to a war in 1937. In a twist of fate, he ends up establishing a school to train others in self-defence.
